specific or relevant to the inquiry.

strands.content: 0 The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below.

limited relevance to the inquiry focus

strands.name: Methodological design
strands.content: No viable method.

strands.name: Research question
strands.content: Not stated or irrelevant.

strands.name: Rationale & context
strands.content: No rationale/context.

strands.name: Methodological design
strands.content: Method loosely related or poorly justified; major feasibility/ethics issues.

strands.name: Research question
strands.content: Stated but vague, too broad/narrow, or not researchable.

strands.name: Rationale & context
strands.content: Minimal or generic rationale; weak link to digital society.

strands.name: Methodological design
strands.content: Appropriate method(s) described; limitations/ethics partly addressed.

strands.name: Research question
strands.content: Clear with some focus; minor ambiguity/scope issues.

strands.name: Rationale & context
strands.content: Relevant context provided; significance partly established.

strands.name: Methodological design
strands.content: Well-justified, replicable method(s) suited to the question (e.g., case study, policy/content analysis, survey/interview, dataset/API analysis, small audit/trace ethnography) with clear sampling, instruments, reliability/validity and digital ethics (consent, privacy, TOS, data protection).

strands.name: Research question
strands.content: Precise, focused, arguable, and feasible within 4,000 words.

strands.name: Rationale & context
strands.content: Compelling rationale situated in digital-society debates (e.g., datafication, platforms, AI ethics, digital divides).

criteria.description: This criterion assesses the extent to which the student effectively communicates the methodology (purpose and practice) used to address the research question.

strands.name: Research question context
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Methodological considerations
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Reproducibility of methodology
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Research question context
strands.content: The research question is stated without context.

strands.name: Methodological considerations
strands.content: Methodological considerations associated with collecting data relevant to the research question are stated.

strands.name: Reproducibility of methodology
strands.content: The description of the methodology for collecting or selecting data lacks the detail to allow for the investigation to be reproduced.

strands.name: Research question context
strands.content: The research question is outlined within a broad context.

strands.name: Methodological considerations
strands.content: Methodological considerations associated with collecting relevant and sufficient data to answer the research question are described.

strands.name: Reproducibility of methodology
strands.content: The description of the methodology for collecting or selecting data allows for the investigation to be reproduced with few ambiguities or omissions.

strands.name: Research question context
strands.content: The research question is described within a specific and appropriate context.

strands.name: Methodological considerations
strands.content: Methodological considerations associated with collecting relevant and sufficient data to answer the research question are explained.

strands.name: Reproducibility of methodology
strands.content: The description of the methodology for collecting or selecting data allows for the investigation to be reproduced.

criteria.description: This criterion assesses the extent to which the student’s report provides evidence that the student has recorded, processed and presented the data in ways that are relevant to the research question.

strands.name: Communication of data
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Consideration of uncertainties
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Processing quality
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Communication of data
strands.content: The recording and processing of the data is communicated but is neither clear nor precise.

strands.name: Consideration of uncertainties
strands.content: The recording and processing of data shows limited evidence of the consideration of uncertainties.

strands.name: Processing quality
strands.content: Some processing of data relevant to addressing the research question is carried out but with major omissions, inaccuracies or inconsistencies.

strands.name: Communication of data
strands.content: The communication of the recording and processing of the data is either clear or precise.

strands.name: Consideration of uncertainties
strands.content: The recording and processing of data shows evidence of a consideration of uncertainties but with some significant omissions or inaccuracies.

strands.name: Processing quality
strands.content: The processing of data relevant to addressing the research question is carried out but with some significant omissions, inaccuracies or inconsistencies.

strands.name: Communication of data
strands.content: The communication of the recording and processing of the data is both clear and precise.

strands.name: Consideration of uncertainties
strands.content: The recording and processing of data shows evidence of an appropriate consideration of uncertainties.

strands.name: Processing quality
strands.content: The processing of data relevant to addressing the research question is carried out appropriately and accurately.

criteria.description: This criterion assesses the extent to which the student successfully answers their research question with regard to their analysis and the accepted scientific context.

strands.name: Relevance and support
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Scientific context comparison
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Practical implications
strands.content: The report does not reach the standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Scientific context comparison

strands.name: Practical implications
strands.content: Practical implications of the findings are stated.

strands.name: Relevance and support

strands.name: Scientific context comparison

strands.name: Practical implications
strands.content: Practical implications of the findings are outlined.

strands.name: Scientific context comparison

strands.name: Practical implications
strands.content: Practical implications of the findings are explained.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
